option.name: originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<?import javafx.geometry.Insets?> <?import javafx.scene.control.Label?> <?import javafx.scene.control.Menu?> <?import javafx.scene.control.MenuBar?> <?import javafx.scene.control.MenuItem?> <?import javafx.scene.control.RadioMenuItem?> <?import javafx.scene.control.SeparatorMenuItem?> <?import javafx.scene.control.ToolBar?> <?import javafx.scene.control.Button?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.BorderPane?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.VBox?> <?import javafx.scene.control.TextField?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.GridPane?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.ColumnConstraints?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.RowConstraints?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.HBox?> <?import javafx.scene.control.RadioButton?> <?import javafx.scene.control.ToggleGroup?> <?import javafx.scene.control.ComboBox?> <?import javafx.scene.control.Spinner?> <?import javafx.scene.control.TextArea?> <?import javafx.scene.control.CheckMenuItem?>
<BorderPane xmlns:fx="http://javafx.com/fxml" fx:controller="uv.naloge.prvaNaloga.MainViewController" prefHeight="850.0" prefWidth="1400.0">
<!-- FRAME: Top MenuBar --> <top> <MenuBar BorderPane.alignment="CENTER"> <Menu text="%menu.file"> <MenuItem text="%menu.file.open" onAction="#onOpen" accelerator="Shortcut+O"/> <MenuItem text="%menu.file.save" onAction="#onSave" accelerator="Shortcut+S"/> <MenuItem text="%menu.file.clear" onAction="#onClear" accelerator="Shortcut+R"/> <MenuItem text="%menu.file.exit" onAction="#onExit" accelerator="Shortcut+Q"/> </Menu> <Menu text="%menu.edit"> <CheckMenuItem fx:id="toggleParticipantNameItem" text="%menu.edit.participantName" onAction="#onToggleParticipantName" /> <CheckMenuItem fx:id="toggleClassTypeItem" text="%menu.edit.classType" onAction="#onToggleClassType" /> <CheckMenuItem fx:id="toggleClassTimeItem" text="%menu.edit.classTime" onAction="#onToggleClassTime" /> </Menu> <Menu text="%menu.view"> <MenuItem text="%menu.view.printAll" onAction="#onPrintAll" /> </Menu> <Menu text="%menu.help"> <MenuItem text="%menu.help.about" onAction="#onAbout" /> <SeparatorMenuItem /> <Menu text="%menu.help.language"> <RadioMenuItem fx:id="languageSiMenuItem" text="_SI" onAction="#onLanguageSi"/> <RadioMenuItem fx:id="languageEngMenuItem" text="_ENG" onAction="#onLanguageEng"/> </Menu> </Menu> </MenuBar> </top>
<center> <VBox spacing="10.0" style="-fx-padding: 12 16 10 16;" BorderPane.alignment="CENTER"> <BorderPane styleClass="floating-toolbar-container"> <center> <ToolBar prefHeight="40.0" styleClass="floating-toolbar" BorderPane.alignment="CENTER_LEFT"> <Button mnemonicParsing="false" text="%toolbar.open" onAction="#onOpen" /> <Button mnemonicParsing="false" text="%toolbar.save" onAction="#onSave" /> <Button mnemonicParsing="false" text="%toolbar.clear" onAction="#onClear" /> <Button mnemonicParsing="false" text="%toolbar.exit" onAction="#onExit" /> <Button mnemonicParsing="false" text="%toolbar.printAll" onAction="#onPrintAll" /> </ToolBar> </center> </BorderPane>
<BorderPane styleClass="floating-body"> <center> <VBox spacing="14.0" style="-fx-padding: 16;" BorderPane.alignment="CENTER"> <BorderPane styleClass="floating-reservation-panel" maxWidth="Infinity"> <center> <GridPane hgap="8.0" vgap="10.0" style="-fx-padding: 12 14;" alignment="CENTER_LEFT"> <columnConstraints> <ColumnConstraints hgrow="NEVER" minWidth="140.0" /> <ColumnConstraints hgrow="NEVER" minWidth="292.0" prefWidth="292.0" maxWidth="292.0" /> <ColumnConstraints hgrow="NEVER" /> <ColumnConstraints hgrow="NEVER" minWidth="80.0" prefWidth="80.0" maxWidth="80.0" /> </columnConstraints>
<Label text="%label.reservation" GridPane.rowIndex="0" GridPane.columnIndex="0" /> <ComboBox fx:id="reservationComboBox" prefWidth="292.0" minWidth="292.0" maxWidth="292.0" GridPane.rowIndex="0" GridPane.columnIndex="1" /> <Label text="%label.atPosition" GridPane.rowIndex="0" GridPane.columnIndex="2"> <GridPane.margin> <Insets left="73.0" /> </GridPane.margin> </Label> <Spinner fx:id="reservationPositionSpinner" editable="true" prefWidth="80.0" GridPane.rowIndex="0" GridPane.columnIndex="3" /> </GridPane> </center> </BorderPane>
<HBox spacing="16.0"> <BorderPane styleClass="floating-input-panel" HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS" maxWidth="Infinity"> <center> <GridPane vgap="12.0" hgap="12.0" style="-fx-padding: 14;"> <columnConstraints> <ColumnConstraints hgrow="NEVER" minWidth="140.0" /> <ColumnConstraints hgrow="ALWAYS" /> </columnConstraints> <rowConstraints> <RowConstraints vgrow="SOMETIMES" /> <RowConstraints vgrow="SOMETIMES" /> <RowConstraints vgrow="SOMETIMES" /> </rowConstraints>
<Label text="%label.participantName" GridPane.rowIndex="0" GridPane.columnIndex="0" /> <TextField fx:id="participantNameField" disable="true" GridPane.rowIndex="0" GridPane.columnIndex="1" />
<Label text="%label.classType" GridPane.rowIndex="1" GridPane.columnIndex="0" /> <TextField fx:id="classTypeField" disable="true" GridPane.rowIndex="1" GridPane.columnIndex="1" />
<Label text="%label.classTime" GridPane.rowIndex="2" GridPane.columnIndex="0" /> <TextField fx:id="classTimeField" disable="true" GridPane.rowIndex="2" GridPane.columnIndex="1" /> </GridPane> </center> </BorderPane>
<BorderPane styleClass="floating-action-panel" HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS" maxWidth="Infinity"> <center> <VBox spacing="10.0" style="-fx-padding: 14;" maxWidth="Infinity"> <VBox spacing="12.0" maxWidth="Infinity"> <RadioButton fx:id="registerRadioButton" text="%radio.registerParticipant" selected="true"> <toggleGroup> <ToggleGroup fx:id="actionToggleGroup"/> </toggleGroup> </RadioButton> <RadioButton fx:id="unregisterRadioButton" text="%radio.unregisterParticipant" toggleGroup="$actionToggleGroup"/> <RadioButton fx:id="changeReservationRadioButton" text="%radio.changeReservation" toggleGroup="$actionToggleGroup"/> </VBox> <HBox alignment="CENTER_LEFT" style="-fx-padding: 8 0 0 0;"> <Button text="%button.executeAction" onAction="#onExecuteAction" maxWidth="Infinity" HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS" /> </HBox> </VBox> </center> </BorderPane> </HBox>
<TextArea fx:id="mainTextArea" prefHeight="225.0" wrapText="true" /> </VBox> </center> </BorderPane> </VBox> </center>
<!-- FRAME: Bottom Status Area --> <bottom> <Label fx:id="statusLabel" text="%status.ready" BorderPane.alignment="CENTER_LEFT" styleClass="status-label"> <BorderPane.margin> <Insets left="10.0" bottom="5.0" /> </BorderPane.margin> </Label> </bottom>
</BorderPane>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<?import javafx.geometry.Insets?> <?import javafx.scene.control.Label?> <?import javafx.scene.control.Menu?> <?import javafx.scene.control.MenuBar?> <?import javafx.scene.control.MenuItem?> <?import javafx.scene.control.RadioMenuItem?> <?import javafx.scene.control.SeparatorMenuItem?> <?import javafx.scene.control.ToolBar?> <?import javafx.scene.control.Button?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.BorderPane?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.VBox?> <?import javafx.scene.control.TextField?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.GridPane?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.ColumnConstraints?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.RowConstraints?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.HBox?> <?import javafx.scene.control.RadioButton?> <?import javafx.scene.control.ToggleGroup?> <?import javafx.scene.control.ComboBox?> <?import javafx.scene.control.Spinner?> <?import javafx.scene.control.TextArea?> <?import javafx.scene.control.CheckMenuItem?>
<BorderPane xmlns:fx="http://javafx.com/fxml" fx:controller="uv.naloge.prvaNaloga.MainViewController" prefHeight="850.0" prefWidth="1400.0">
<!-- FRAME: Top MenuBar --> <top> <MenuBar BorderPane.alignment="CENTER"> <Menu text="%menu.file"> <MenuItem text="%menu.file.open" onAction="#onOpen" accelerator="Shortcut+O"/> <MenuItem text="%menu.file.save" onAction="#onSave" accelerator="Shortcut+S"/> <MenuItem text="%menu.file.clear" onAction="#onClear" accelerator="Shortcut+R"/> <MenuItem text="%menu.file.exit" onAction="#onExit" accelerator="Shortcut+Q"/> </Menu> <Menu text="%menu.edit"> <CheckMenuItem fx:id="toggleParticipantNameItem" text="%menu.edit.participantName" onAction="#onToggleParticipantName" /> <CheckMenuItem fx:id="toggleClassTypeItem" text="%menu.edit.classType" onAction="#onToggleClassType" /> <CheckMenuItem fx:id="toggleClassTimeItem" text="%menu.edit.classTime" onAction="#onToggleClassTime" /> </Menu> <Menu text="%menu.view"> <MenuItem text="%menu.view.printAll" onAction="#onPrintAll" /> </Menu> <Menu text="%menu.help"> <MenuItem text="%menu.help.about" onAction="#onAbout" /> <SeparatorMenuItem /> <Menu text="%menu.help.language"> <RadioMenuItem fx:id="languageSiMenuItem" text="_SI" onAction="#onLanguageSi"/> <RadioMenuItem fx:id="languageEngMenuItem" text="_ENG" onAction="#onLanguageEng"/> </Menu> </Menu> </MenuBar> </top>
<center> <VBox spacing="10.0" style="-fx-padding: 12 16 10 16;" BorderPane.alignment="CENTER"> <BorderPane styleClass="floating-toolbar-container"> <center> <ToolBar prefHeight="40.0" styleClass="floating-toolbar" BorderPane.alignment="CENTER_LEFT"> <Button mnemonicParsing="false" text="%toolbar.open" onAction="#onOpen" /> <Button mnemonicParsing="false" text="%toolbar.save" onAction="#onSave" /> <Button mnemonicParsing="false" text="%toolbar.clear" onAction="#onClear" /> <Button mnemonicParsing="false" text="%toolbar.exit" onAction="#onExit" /> <Button mnemonicParsing="false" text="%toolbar.printAll" onAction="#onPrintAll" /> </ToolBar> </center> </BorderPane>
<BorderPane styleClass="floating-body"> <center> <VBox spacing="14.0" style="-fx-padding: 16;" BorderPane.alignment="CENTER"> <BorderPane styleClass="floating-reservation-panel" maxWidth="Infinity"> <center> <GridPane hgap="8.0" vgap="10.0" style="-fx-padding: 12 14;" alignment="CENTER_LEFT"> <columnConstraints> <ColumnConstraints hgrow="NEVER" minWidth="140.0" /> <ColumnConstraints hgrow="NEVER" minWidth="292.0" prefWidth="292.0" maxWidth="292.0" /> <ColumnConstraints hgrow="NEVER" /> <ColumnConstraints hgrow="NEVER" minWidth="80.0" prefWidth="80.0" maxWidth="80.0" /> </columnConstraints>
<Label text="%label.reservation" GridPane.rowIndex="0" GridPane.columnIndex="0" /> <ComboBox fx:id="reservationComboBox" prefWidth="292.0" minWidth="292.0" maxWidth="292.0" GridPane.rowIndex="0" GridPane.columnIndex="1" /> <Label text="%label.atPosition" GridPane.rowIndex="0" GridPane.columnIndex="2"> <GridPane.margin> <Insets left="73.0" /> </GridPane.margin> </Label> <Spinner fx:id="reservationPositionSpinner" editable="true" prefWidth="80.0" GridPane.rowIndex="0" GridPane.columnIndex="3" /> </GridPane> </center> </BorderPane>
<HBox spacing="16.0"> <BorderPane styleClass="floating-input-panel" HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS" maxWidth="Infinity"> <center> <GridPane vgap="12.0" hgap="12.0" style="-fx-padding: 14;"> <columnConstraints> <ColumnConstraints hgrow="NEVER" minWidth="140.0" /> <ColumnConstraints hgrow="ALWAYS" /> </columnConstraints> <rowConstraints> <RowConstraints vgrow="SOMETIMES" /> <RowConstraints vgrow="SOMETIMES" /> <RowConstraints vgrow="SOMETIMES" /> </rowConstraints>
<Label text="%label.participantName" GridPane.rowIndex="0" GridPane.columnIndex="0" /> <TextField fx:id="participantNameField" disable="true" GridPane.rowIndex="0" GridPane.columnIndex="1" />
<Label text="%label.classType" GridPane.rowIndex="1" GridPane.columnIndex="0" /> <TextField fx:id="classTypeField" disable="true" GridPane.rowIndex="1" GridPane.columnIndex="1" />
<Label text="%label.classTime" GridPane.rowIndex="2" GridPane.columnIndex="0" /> <TextField fx:id="classTimeField" disable="true" GridPane.rowIndex="2" GridPane.columnIndex="1" /> </GridPane> </center> </BorderPane>
<BorderPane styleClass="floating-action-panel" HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS" maxWidth="Infinity"> <center> <VBox spacing="10.0" style="-fx-padding: 14;" maxWidth="Infinity"> <VBox spacing="10.0" maxWidth="Infinity"> <BorderPane styleClass="floating-radio-option" maxWidth="Infinity"> <left> <RadioButton fx:id="registerRadioButton" styleClass="floating-radio-button" text="%radio.registerParticipant" selected="true"> <toggleGroup> <ToggleGroup fx:id="actionToggleGroup"/> </toggleGroup> </RadioButton> </left> </BorderPane> <BorderPane styleClass="floating-radio-option" maxWidth="Infinity"> <left> <RadioButton fx:id="unregisterRadioButton" styleClass="floating-radio-button" text="%radio.unregisterParticipant" toggleGroup="$actionToggleGroup"/> </left> </BorderPane> <BorderPane styleClass="floating-radio-option" maxWidth="Infinity"> <left> <RadioButton fx:id="changeReservationRadioButton" styleClass="floating-radio-button" text="%radio.changeReservation" toggleGroup="$actionToggleGroup"/> </left> </BorderPane> </VBox> <HBox alignment="CENTER_LEFT" style="-fx-padding: 8 0 0 0;"> <Button text="%button.executeAction" onAction="#onExecuteAction" maxWidth="Infinity" HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS" /> </HBox> </VBox> </center> </BorderPane> </HBox>
<TextArea fx:id="mainTextArea" prefHeight="225.0" wrapText="true" /> </VBox> </center> </BorderPane> </VBox> </center>
<!-- FRAME: Bottom Status Area --> <bottom> <Label fx:id="statusLabel" text="%status.ready" BorderPane.alignment="CENTER_LEFT" styleClass="status-label"> <BorderPane.margin> <Insets left="10.0" bottom="5.0" /> </BorderPane.margin> </Label> </bottom>
</BorderPane>

option.name: originalContent
updatedContent
